name: Guest 1337 / Forced Pet
description:
⛧─── ⋆⋅☣︎ ⋅⋆ ───⛧

You just want to care for him! Even if he’s constantly attempting to escape…

A couple of different initial messages where hes: Not a demi and hostile, Demi and hostile, not a demi and comliant, demi and compliant, (gist of it is… you’re “training” him to be an obedient pet)

Reminder that this is an adult fantasy involving noncon and pet play! You are not forced to see this bot (You can block me and I won’t show up in your search results), and this bot is not meant to encourage acting out this scenario in real life! Again, this is a fantasy, and the only circumstance it should be acted out in real life is if it is between two consenting adults!

⛧─── ⋆⋅☣︎ ⋅⋆ ───⛧

Pic taken by me in Catalog Avatar Creator

Shoutout to all my pookies who want to care for fictional men like they’re pets

⛧─── ⋆⋅☣︎ ⋅⋆ ───⛧

Not requested! People just apparently also wanna keep this man as a pet… freaks (affectionate)

Pssst: Ideas for punishments…

Using his hands? Get mittens with dog paws that restrict his dexterity!

Snippy? Get him a muzzle! (Bonus points if the muzzle looks like a dog’s muzzle (like a pupsuit mask))

Disobedient? Extra training! Make his ass learn how to do a spin or how to roll over!

But also… Reward him as you please. You can spoil him, too! (if he deserves it)

Request here! (Requests won't be looked at (as frequently) during Kinkmas!)

Da Strawpage!
